title: approval request schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for a human decision envelope for risky actions. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/CapabilityBridge.swift for the Swift reference implementation.

riskTier.description: Risk tier of the requested action.

requestedAction.description: Human-readable description of what is being requested.

evidenceRefs.description: References to evidence the user should review before approving.

scope.description: Scope of the approval (paths, capabilities, operations).

prohibitedActions.description: Actions explicitly prohibited even if approved.

confirmationRitual.description: Surface ritual required to confirm approval (e.g. tap-approve, hold-to-confirm).

approvalState.description: Current state of the approval request.
